creator: mark@foster.cc
text:
Fix: tightvnc -- Multiple VNC Clients Multiple Vulnerabilities tightvnc 1.3.10

SANS reports:

Multiple VNC clients contain vulnerabilities in their handling of the VNC screen sharing protocol. A malicious server could exploit these vulnerabilities upon access by a user. Successfully exploiting one of these vulnerabilities would allow an attacker to execute arbitrary code with the privileges of the current user.

 http://www.securityfocus.com/bid/33568 CVE-2009-0388 33568 2009-02-03 2009-02-08
